channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: TMC chief urges rebels to stay united ahead of critical rally
item.description: The article discusses the political developments in West Bengal as Trinamool Congress (TMC) chief Mamata Banerjee addresses internal dissent within her party. She has instructed rebel factions to with...

item.title: AI Integration in Trial Courts Boosts Case Resolution by 6%
item.description: A large-scale field trial in Pakistan's justice system revealed that integrating generative AI (JudgeGPT) into trial courts increased annual case resolution by 6.3%, with targeted training enhancing e...

item.title: PNP enhances security measures ahead of SONA and BARMM polls
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has announced the deployment of over 20,000 personnel to ensure security during the State of the Nation Address (SONA) and to bolster safety measures for the Bangs...

item.title: CAC Gives 100,000 Non-Compliant Companies 90 Days to Update Records or Risk Deregistration
item.description: The Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) has started another nationwide compliance exercise aimed at removing inactive and non-compliant companies from Nigeria's official register. According to the comm...

item.title: Trump's Accusations Against China Risk Straining U.S.-China Relations
item.description: President Donald Trump's recent allegations that China illicitly obtained 220 million American voter files have sparked significant diplomatic tension, according to NBC News. The claims, which Trump l...

item.title: Jim Acosta Criticizes Trump's 'Deranged Dictator' Speech for Its Chilling Implications
item.description: In a scathing analysis, former CNN anchor Jim Acosta condemned President Donald Trump's recent primetime address as a 'deranged dictator speech' that raised alarming concerns about threats to journali...

item.title: Femi Falana Criticizes FG for Unequal Housing Benefits to Judges
item.description: Human rights lawyer Femi Falana has accused the Federal Government of discriminatory practices by gifting houses to judges, arguing it's illegal and unequal. He highlighted that such privileges should...

item.title: Sony's plan to phase out physical PlayStation discs sparks widespread petition and debate
item.description: Sony's decision to stop producing physical PlayStation game discs by 2028 has ignited a significant public reaction, with over 320,000 people signing a petition initiated by Winnipeg-based PNP Games. ...

item.title: A Policeman's Reflections on Past Actions and Their Consequences
item.description: The article is an excerpt from the novel 'Backlash' by Devadas VM, translated into Malayalam by Nandakumar K. It follows Shreedharan, a retired policeman who is haunted by his past actions. The story ...

item.title: Elderly Women in Makueni Boost Health Through Weekly Football Matches
item.description: A group of grandmothers from Makueni, captured playing football in vibrant kits, has gone viral after a Washington Post clip shared on TikTok. The Maiani Soccer Grannies, led by Juliana Mulandi, have ...

item.title: Aston Martin collaborates with Call of Duty to create virtual Dreadnought SUV
item.description: Aston Martin has partnered with Infinity Ward and Activision to develop the Dreadnought, a digital-only concept SUV for the upcoming Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 game. This virtual vehicle, designed...

item.title: Ex-Prime Minister's Daughter Faces Corruption Charges
item.description: The daughter of a former prime minister has been arrested in connection with a high-profile corruption investigation. Authorities allege she colluded with senior officials to embezzle public funds thr...

item.title: Amazon and Starlink Compete for South African Market Access
item.description: The article discusses how Jeff Bezos's Amazon, through its subsidiary Leo, has outmaneuvered Elon Musk's Starlink in securing a foothold in the South African market. By partnering with a local firm, A...

item.title: Alleged drunk driver crash on EDSA leaves 1 dead, 7 injured
item.description: A severe traffic accident occurred on EDSA early Friday when an alleged drunk driver's black SUV collided with multiple vehicles, resulting in one fatality and seven injuries. CCTV footage from the Me...

item.title: South L.A. Gang Member Sentenced for $2.8M Bank Fraud Scheme Using Social Media
item.description: Chase Matthew Griffin, a 26-year-old member of the South L.A. Crips street gang, was sentenced to nine years in federal prison for his role in a $2.8 million bank fraud scheme. Prosecutors revealed th...

item.title: PMD forecasts widespread rain and thundershowers across Pakistan from July 18
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a forecast predicting widespread rain, windstorms, and thundershowers across most parts of the country from July 18 to 25. The advisory highligh...

item.title: Comelec approves synchronization of Naga City plebiscite with BSKE elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has approved the request of Naga City Mayor Leni Robredo to synchronize the plebiscite on converting the city into a highly-urbanized city with the Barangay and S...

item.title: Ukraine faces political and military crisis as Russian strikes kill four civilians
item.description: Russian strikes on Ukraine overnight killed at least four civilians and wounded 20 others, according to President Volodymyr Zelensky, who is navigating a political crisis after dismissing his popular ...

item.title: Roosters edge ahead as Storm's injury woes hamper progress
item.description: The Sydney Roosters have taken an early lead against the Melbourne Storm in an NRL clash, with the Storm facing multiple injuries to their squad. The match, which began with the Storm kicking off, saw...

item.title: Former AP Officer Convicted of Murder After Shooting Colleague in Samburu
item.description: A former Administration Police (AP) officer, Patrick Marwa, has been sentenced to 40 years in prison after being convicted of murdering his colleague, Dancun Cheruiyot, during a disciplinary dispute i...
